hypothesis: If a closed-loop Bayesian optimization platform optimizes six operating parameters—bicarbonate temperature, bicarbonate concentration, cathode flow rate, anode flow rate, KOH concentration, and total applied current density—during 5-minute electrolysis with silver nanoparticle-coated gas-diffusion electrodes, then reactor yield will be maximized relative to initial random experiments because the Bayesian model efficiently identifies near-optimal parameter combinations in a high-dimensional, noisy system.
